CVE-2023-25399.title: A refcounting issue which leads to potential memory leak was disc ...
CVE-2023-25399.description: A refcounting issue which leads to potential memory leak was discovered in scipy commit 8627df31ab in Py_FindObjects() function. Note: This is disputed as a bug and not a vulnerability. SciPy is not designed to be exposed to untrusted users or data directly.

CVE-2023-29824.title: A use-after-free issue was discovered in Py_FindObjects() functio ...
CVE-2023-29824.description: A use-after-free issue was discovered in Py_FindObjects() function in SciPy versions prior to 1.8.0. NOTE: the vendor and discoverer indicate that this is not a security issue.
